title: piriqueta guianensis subsp. guianensis
intro: Piriqueta guianensis subsp. guianensis, also known as the 'Yellow Passion Flower', is a plant species native to South America, particularly in the Guiana Shield region. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Piriqueta guianensis subsp. guianensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
